allow:
Bash(git -C "C:\Users\Brendan Cameron\desktop\powerbi-viewer" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Version 1.1.15 - Fix slideshow controls not reappearing on mouse movement

Fixed issue where slideshow controls would not reappear after hiding when moving the mouse.

Changes:
- Added transparent overlay div that catches mouse movements when controls are hidden
- Overlay appears at z-index 5 only when controls are not visible
- Mouse movement on overlay immediately shows controls
- Added z-index 10 to control bars to ensure they appear above overlay
- Improved mouse event handling with both window and document listeners
- Fixed timeout cleanup in useEffect to prevent memory leaks

The issue occurred because the Power BI iframe was blocking mouse events from reaching
the window/document event listeners. The transparent overlay sits above the iframe and
catches mouse movements, then disappears once controls are shown to allow interaction
with the report.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
